title: I am allowed to want this
subtitle: A three-minute energy statement for the guilt of wanting more.
excerpt: A short release-and-allow practice for the moment when a real want feels selfish or too much. Drawn from Rebecca's Money Zone method and adapted for self-worth as much as for money.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 15 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025) and the Release / Allow structure of The Money Zone: How To Release Hidden Resistance, Allow Flow And Manifest Millions (Rebecca Page, 2024), chapters 2 to 5. The release-and-allow framing is Rebecca's own method.

practice.whenToUse: Use when a real want has shown up and you can feel the guilt of wanting it: the bigger house, the lighter year, the income that gives back time.

glossaryTerms.definition: The core movement of Rebecca's Money Zone method. Release the resistance you can feel; allow the thing you actually want. Said three times each, out loud or under the breath.

content.text: Wanting a bigger life can feel like a moral problem. The bigger house. The lighter year. The income that buys back time. The closer you get to the want, the louder the voice that says you're being greedy, selfish, or too much.
This is a three-minute energy statement for that moment. Two parts: a release of the guilt, an allowing of the want. Said three times each, out loud if you can, in your mind if you can't.
The practice
Stand or sit. Feet on the floor. Hand on your chest if it helps. Picture the thing you want in front of you, close enough to see clearly, not so close that it presses on the chest.
Release
Say the following three times. Slow. Let each repetition land before the next.

attrs.quote: I am ready to release the belief that wanting this much is wrong. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

content.text: Notice anything that comes up. A tightening in the throat. A line your mother used to say. A picture of who you'd be embarrassed in front of. Let it surface, let it pass.
Allow
Now the same shape, in the other direction. Three times.

attrs.quote: I am ready to align with and allow myself to want this fully. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.

content.text: When the second round lands, drop your hands. Slow breath in. Slow breath out. Picture the wanted thing still there, the want sitting steadier in your chest.
What you might notice

The release often goes deeper than the wording suggests. People report tears on the release round and laughter on the allow round, or both at once. Sometimes the want gets clearer mid-practice: a specific house, a specific number, a specific shape of life. Write down what arrives if you want.
When this isn't working
If the guilt is too loud for the statement to land, work the body first. Try
Tapping for daily money panic
(linked below) to settle the nervous system, then come back to this. The release lands easier on a body that isn't bracing.
Where this practice comes from
The release-and-allow structure is the central movement of Rebecca's Money Zone method, set out in
The Money Zone: How To Release Hidden Resistance, Allow Flow And Manifest Millions
(2024). The specific theme of this practice, releasing guilt around wanting wealth, is drawn from Day 15 of
MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program
(2025). The pairing of the two, release-and-allow as a self-worth practice rather than only a money practice, is original to the homemade.education library.
